## Summary

- Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -B -m pytest tests -q -p no:cacheprovider`
- [ ] `python -B scripts/release_check.py --allow-local-env`

## Security And Evidence Handling

- [ ] No secrets, case databases, evidence logs, generated reports, or local workspace files are included.
- [ ] Public docs and examples use placeholders or synthetic data only.
